channel.title: Azure Boost on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Boost on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In development] Private Preview: Guest RDMA on Azure Boost
item.description:
Guest RDMA is in private preview on Azure in UK South. It uses Azure Boost to enable RDMA in the guest OS for high-throughput, ultra-low-latency networking within the same region.

  • Source: Azure Updates
